title: ononis natrix proles arenaria
intro: Ononis natrix proles arenaria, also known as Restharrow, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Restharrow include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
